name: Beijing Bayi Space LCD Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Beijing Bayi Space LCD Technology Co., Ltd. manufactures liquid crystal display (LCD) material, polymer dispersed liquid crystal (PDLC), and organic electroluminescent display (OLED) material. The company's products include single liquid crystal material, such as ester liquid crystals, alkyne liquid crystals, olefin liquid crystals, chiral liquid crystals, and acrylate liquid crystals; mixed liquid crystal material, such as twisted nematic (TN) LCD, super-twisted nematic (STN) LCD, thin-film-transistor (TFT) LCD, smart film, and liquid crystal monomers; and pharmaceutical intermediates. The company's products cover all kinds of liquid crystal material used in mobile phone, notebook and computer monitor, and LCD television (TV). The company serves crystal LCD panel makers. Beijing Bayi Space LCD Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 2004 and is based in Beijing, China.
